overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character Miles Morales walking through a sunny urban downtown environment. The character crosses streets, walks past commercial storefronts including a Valeria clothing store, interacts with pedestrians, and passes a fire department ambulance in a detailed modern city setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and commercial buildings

events.description: character finishes crossing street and steps onto sidewalk
pedestrian in red jacket waves enthusiastically at the character

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk from left to right, then continuing straight along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket standing on sidewalk waving at the character

entered.detail: vertical yellow sign with black text reading PARK attached to building
overhead traffic signal showing green light suspended over intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on asphalt
silver four-door sedan car driving through the intersection
tall building with horizontal grey and white stripes and dark windows

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a sunlit city street at a crosswalk, passing a silver sedan. After reaching the sidewalk, a pedestrian in a red jacket waves enthusiastically. The environment features tall striped office buildings and a parking garage sign visible on the left.

events.description: approaching the Valeria clothing store with large display windows
character stops walking to look at mannequins in the store window

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, then stopping briefly to look at clothing displays in the Valeria store window before continuing

entered.detail: retail store with large glass windows and orange sign reading Valeria above entrance
clothing mannequins visible through the store window displaying fashion items
decorative arched entrance next to the store with stone surround
ornamental light fixtures mounted on the building exterior

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with retail stores. The Valeria clothing store dominates the right side with large display windows showing mannequins. The character pauses to look at the window display before continuing past the arched doorway and wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk with benches and street crossing

events.description: character crosses another street at crosswalk with pedestrians
passing by pedestrians sitting on park benches along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking down the tree-lined sidewalk, crossing another street at the crosswalk, and continuing past pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black van driving slowly through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: mature deciduous trees lining the sidewalk providing dappled shade
wooden park benches with people sitting along the building front
green and white signage for a dollar store visible on building
white striped pedestrian crossing at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a tree-lined sidewalk with dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves. After passing the dollar store sign, the character crosses another street at the crosswalk, navigating around pedestrians and a black van. People are seated on park benches along the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with emergency vehicle and mixed architecture

events.description: approaching a large red fire department ambulance parked on the street
character walks past the ambulance and continues down the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing the parked emergency vehicle and continuing toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: red fire department ambulance parked on the side of the street with emergency lights

entered.detail: large red emergency vehicle with Fire Department and Ambulance text visible
older multi-story building with red brick facade and arched windows
yellow taxi cab visible in the distance at the next intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the street approaching a large red fire department ambulance parked on the left. The architecture shifts to older brick buildings in the background. After passing the emergency vehicle, the character continues toward the next intersection where a yellow taxi is visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban downtown that transitions from a modern commercial district to a street lined with older brick architecture. It begins with the character crossing a bright city street past a silver sedan and a parking garage, where a pedestrian in a red jacket waves from the sidewalk. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts toward a row of retail stores, pausing briefly before the large display windows and mannequins of a Valeria clothing boutique. The camera then follows the character through dappled sunlight under city trees and across another crosswalk filled with pedestrians and a black van. Finally, the environment opens up as the character passes a large red fire department ambulance and moves toward a distant yellow taxi against a backdrop of traditional brick buildings.
